# Baton v0.5.0 decommission evidence

This directory contains immutable, inert evidence for reviewing a direct
v0.5.0-to-v0.7 decommission. `managed-files.json` stores the exact output of
the v0.5.0 renderer as base64 and SHA-256. `adopter-inventories.json` covers
unmodified, modified, partial, and already-removed installations.

The fixtures do not authorize deletion or issue enrollment. Exact bytes prove
only file ownership; settings and every issue selected for enrollment still
require explicit review.
